Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE1: Search email for Meridian Consulting Group correspondence using `search_emails` (query: "Meridian" or "Vanessa Torres" or similar) to discover the full email history on the Meridian account.
OE2: Read the escalation email from Vanessa Torres (March 22, CC'd to David) using `get_email_by_id` (email_id: discovered from search) to discover the client's frustration about communication gaps and being ghosted.
OE3: Read the original relocation request from Vanessa (March 10) using `get_email_by_id` (email_id: discovered from search) to discover all 4 contracted employees including Marcus Lee (H-1B visa holder, immigration attorney Janet Kwon at Harmon & Kwon LLP).
OE4: Read Catalina's reply to Vanessa (March 10) using `get_email_by_id` (email_id: discovered from search) to discover she promised to set up all relocations within 10 business days.
OE5: Search SENT emails for Catalina's internal handoff messages about Meridian using `search_emails` (query: "Meridian" or similar, folder_name: "SENT") to find internal communications about the Meridian setup.
OE6: Read Catalina's ops handoff email to Chloe (March 11) using `get_email_by_id` (email_id: discovered from search) to discover only 3 of 4 employees listed -- Marcus Lee was omitted (root cause of the breakdown).
OE7: Read Catalina's invoice request to Hana (March 13) using `get_email_by_id` (email_id: discovered from search) to confirm she explicitly requested invoicing for 3 relocations at $7,560 total.
OE8: Read Hana's invoice confirmation (March 15) using `get_email_by_id` (email_id: discovered from search) to confirm invoice INV-2026-0390 was generated at $7,560 (3 x $2,520).
OE9: Read Vanessa's unanswered follow-up about Marcus Lee's visa timeline (March 18) using `get_email_by_id` (email_id: discovered from search) to discover the email went unanswered by Catalina.
OE10: Search Slack for Meridian-related messages using `conversations_search_messages` (search_query: "Meridian" or similar) to find Chloe's coordinator assignments (only 3 employees), Hana's invoice post ($7,560 for 3 relocations), Catalina's false "onboarding is on track" status update, and Emeka's churn warning.
OE11: Read thread on Emeka's churn warning (March 19) using `conversations_replies` (channel_id: "C002", thread_ts: discovered from search) to discover Emeka flagged Meridian shopping other providers and Catalina dismissed it.
OE12: Search Airtable Client Accounts for Meridian using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Client Accounts", field_name: "Client" or similar, value: "Meridian Consulting Group") to find the account record showing Total Relocations: 3 (incorrect -- should be 4).
OE13: Search Airtable Relocations for Meridian using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Company" or similar, value: "Meridian Consulting Group") to find only 3 relocation records -- Marcus Lee is missing.
OE14: Search CRM for Meridian company and get details using `crm_search_companies` (name: "Meridian") then `crm_get_company` (id: discovered) to confirm client information, Catalina Dubois as AM, company_id (company_meridian_cg), and 4 contracted relocations.
OE15: Search CRM deals for Meridian using `crm_search_deals` (company_id: "company_meridian_cg" or discovered ID) to find deal_meridian_q2 showing $10,080 contract for 4 relocations at $2,520 each.
OE16: List CRM engagements for Meridian using `crm_list_engagements` (company_ids: ["company_meridian_cg"] or discovered ID) to find the kickoff engagement noting 4 relocations confirmed.
OE17: Search QuickBooks for Meridian customer and invoice using `quickbooks_search_customers` and `quickbooks_search_invoices` (criteria: matching "Meridian" or similar) to find customer balance ($7,560) and INV-2026-0390 at $7,560 (3 relocations) versus $10,080 contracted (4 relocations) -- a $2,520 gap.
OE18: Search Linear for Meridian issues and get detail using `linear_list_issues` (query: "Meridian" or similar) then `linear_get_issue` (id: discovered) to find the onboarding ticket (issue 400) stale since March 12, listing all 4 employees but no progress updates since creation.
OE19: Search Calendar for Meridian events using `calendar_search_events` (query: "Meridian" or similar) to find the kickoff call confirming all 4 relocations were discussed.
OE20: Search Airtable Client Accounts for Catalina Dubois using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Client Accounts", field_name: "Account Manager" or similar, value: "Catalina Dubois") to identify her other active accounts (Canopy Health, PivotPoint Labs, NorthWind Technologies).
OE21: Search CRM deals for Catalina's other accounts using `crm_search_deals` (company_id or dealname for Canopy Health, PivotPoint Labs, NorthWind Technologies) to check contract amounts and deal stages across all three accounts.
OE22: Search Airtable Relocations for Catalina's other accounts using `airtable_search_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Company" or similar, value: "Canopy Health" / "PivotPoint Labs" / "NorthWind Technologies") to verify relocation setup matches contracts for each account.
OE23: Search QuickBooks invoices for Catalina's other accounts using `quickbooks_search_invoices` (criteria: matching "Canopy" / "PivotPoint" / "NorthWind" or similar) to verify invoicing matches contract amounts across all three accounts.
OE24: Search Linear issues and emails for Catalina's other accounts using `linear_list_issues` (query: "Canopy" / "PivotPoint" / "NorthWind") and `search_emails` (query: matching each account) to check for stale tickets and unanswered client communications.
OE25: Update CRM deal stage for Meridian to at_risk using `crm_update_deal_stage` (id: "deal_meridian_q2" or discovered ID, dealstage: "at_risk" or equivalent risk-flagging stage).
OE26: Create Airtable relocation record for Marcus Lee using `airtable_create_record` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", fields including Name: "Marcus Lee", Company: "Meridian Consulting Group", Origin: "New York, NY", Destination: "Chicago, IL", Special Requirements: "H-1B visa holder").
OE27: Update Airtable Client Accounts record for Meridian using `airtable_update_records` (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblClientAccts01" or discovered ID, records: updating Total Relocations from 3 to 4).
OE28: Update existing Linear onboarding ticket using `linear_update_issue` (id: "issue_meridian_onboarding" or discovered ID) to reflect dropped relocation, communication failures, and current escalation status.
OE29: Create Linear issue for urgent Marcus Lee relocation setup using `linear_create_issue` (team: "team_operations" or discovered ID, title referencing Marcus Lee relocation and H-1B visa coordination).
OE30: Create Linear issue for Meridian invoice correction using `linear_create_issue` (team: "team_operations" or similar, title referencing invoice correction from $7,560 to $10,080).
OE31: Send email to Chloe Vance about emergency coordinator assignment using `send_email` (sender: david.chen@moveops.com, recipients: ["chloe.vance@moveops.com"], content about Marcus Lee's missing relocation needing urgent coordinator assignment). May first look up contact via `contacts_search_contacts`.
OE32: Send email to Hana Kim about invoice correction using `send_email` (sender: david.chen@moveops.com, recipients: ["hana.kim@moveops.com"], content about Meridian invoice needing correction from $7,560 to $10,080). May first look up contact via `contacts_search_contacts`.
OE33: Send holding email to Vanessa Torres from David using `send_email` (sender: david.chen@moveops.com, recipients: ["vanessa.torres@meridiancg.com"], content acknowledging her concern and committing to a full update by end of day).
OE34: Schedule follow-up call with Vanessa Torres using `calendar_add_calendar_event` (title referencing Meridian follow-up call, attendees including vanessa.torres@meridiancg.com and david.chen@moveops.com, date: next business day).
OE35: Post in team Slack channel about Meridian situation using `conversations_add_message` (channel_id: "C002" or customer-engagement channel, content alerting team that Meridian is an active situation and to direct any related information to David).
OE36: Send Slack message to Catalina Dubois telling her to call David ASAP using `conversations_add_message` (channel_id: "C002" or discovered team channel such as #customer-engagement, payload: content tagging or directed at Catalina requesting urgent callback about Meridian).
OE37: Log CRM engagement on Meridian account using `crm_create_engagement` (engagement_type: "NOTE", body summarizing investigation findings and corrective actions taken, company_ids: ["company_meridian_cg"]).
OE38: Send briefing email to David with full findings using `send_email` (sender: david.chen@moveops.com, recipients: ["david.chen@moveops.com"], content covering Meridian findings, root cause analysis, invoice discrepancy, unanswered emails, churn signal, actions taken, and Catalina's other accounts status). May first look up contact via `contacts_search_contacts`

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 An email was sent (via send_email) to [vanessa.torres@meridiancg.com](mailto:vanessa.torres@meridiancg.com) acknowledging the Meridian account concern and confirming David is personally handling it.
outcome
 ✓—✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The trajectory shows a send_email tool call with vanessa.torres@meridiancg.com as the recipient and content explicitly stating David is handling it personally: 'I am now handling your account directly.'
—Run #2No justification
✓Run #3send_email was called with vanessa.torres@meridiancg.com as recipient, with content explicitly acknowledging the situation and stating David is personally handling it ('I am personally handling this starting right now').
✓Run #4send_email was called with recipient vanessa.torres@meridiancg.com, subject 'Meridian Consulting — David Chen, Personal Follow-Up', containing a personal apology and recovery plan from David.
✓Run #5Item 90 shows a send_email tool call with recipient vanessa.torres@meridiancg.com. The email acknowledges the situation with a personal apology and states David is taking ownership and handling it personally.
✓Run #6The agent used reply_to_email (email_id: email_vanessa_meridian_escalation_01) with sender david.chen@moveops.com, explicitly stating 'I have personally taken ownership of your account as of today' and addressing the communication gap. The evidence notes accept reply_to_email.
2 A briefing email was sent (via send_email) to [david.chen@moveops.com](mailto:david.chen@moveops.com) containing the full findings on the Meridian account.
outcome
 ✓—✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1A send_email tool call was made with david.chen@moveops.com as the recipient, with a full rundown email containing 5 detailed parts covering the Meridian investigation, corrective actions, Catalina's other accounts, pattern assessment, and open items.
—Run #2No justification
✓Run #3send_email was called with david.chen@moveops.com as recipient containing the full rundown including all findings on Meridian and Catalina's accounts.

✓Run #5Item 138 shows a send_email tool call with recipient david.chen@moveops.com containing the full internal briefing with Meridian findings and Catalina account audit.

3 An email was sent (via send_email) to [chloe.vance@moveops.com](mailto:chloe.vance@moveops.com) alerting her about missing relocation(s) needing emergency coordinator assignment.
outcome
 ✗—✗✓✓✓ 60%
✗Run #1The agent notified Chloe via a conversations_add_message to #operations channel, not via send_email to chloe.vance@moveops.com. No send_email call was made to Chloe's email address.
